englishDefinitions: Looked for and examined this place carefully, usually to decide if it is suitable for filming, an event, or another purpose.
persianTranslation: این محل را برای مناسب بودن زیر نظر گرفته
examples: The director scouted this location before the shoot began.
We scouted this location to find the best view of the lake.
They scouted this location for a possible wedding venue.
